hypotheses.title: SpaceX's Inclusion in Nasdaq-100 and Its Impact on Tech Sector Momentum
hypotheses.plain_english_thesis: SpaceX's addition to the Nasdaq-100 may catalyze broader tech sector momentum, especially in AI and space-related stocks, as increased index inclusion could drive inflows into Nasdaq-100 ETFs and boost investor sentiment.
hypotheses.economic_market_mechanism: Index inclusion typically attracts passive investment flows, which can amplify stock price movements. If SpaceX is perceived as a high-growth, AI-driven company, its inclusion may signal broader confidence in the tech sector, especially in AI and space innovation.
hypotheses.target_definition: The potential for Nasdaq-100 ETFs and AI sector stocks to outperform broader markets due to increased institutional and retail investor attention.
hypotheses.trigger_logic_pseudocode: IF (SPCX Price Movement > 5%) AND (Nasdaq-100 ETF Inflows > 10B) THEN (AI Sector P/E Ratios > 30) THEN Hypothesis Triggered
hypotheses.why_this_should_work: Index inclusion often leads to increased trading volume and inflows into ETFs, which can drive short-term momentum. If SpaceX is viewed as a leader in AI and space tech, it may attract investors looking for exposure to high-growth sectors.
hypotheses.when_this_may_fail: If the broader market is in a downturn or if AI stocks are broadly overvalued, the positive impact of SpaceX's inclusion may be muted.
hypotheses.data_quality_or_leakage_risks: SPCX price data may be volatile and subject to market sentiment shifts unrelated to index inclusion. ETF inflow data may lag or be delayed.
hypotheses.minimum_data_coverage_requirement: At least 75% coverage of Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows and AI sector P/E ratios for the past 30 days.
validation_plan: Compare SPCX price movement against Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows post-inclusion
Analyze AI sector P/E ratios before and after inclusion
Monitor ETF inflows for 15 business days post-inclusion
hypotheses.dashboard_implication: Monitor Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows and AI sector P/E ratios for signs of increased momentum post-SpaceX inclusion.

hypotheses.title: AI Stock Volatility and Nasdaq-100 ETF Performance Correlation
hypotheses.plain_english_thesis: Increased volatility in AI stocks may lead to a temporary selloff in Nasdaq-100 ETFs, as investors reassess the risk-reward profile of AI-driven companies within the index.
hypotheses.economic_market_mechanism: AI stocks are a significant component of the Nasdaq-100. If AI stocks experience a sharp decline, it may lead to a broader selloff in Nasdaq-100 ETFs as investors rebalance their portfolios or reduce exposure to high-volatility sectors.
hypotheses.target_definition: The potential for AI stock volatility to spill over into Nasdaq-100 ETFs and broader market indices, increasing overall portfolio risk.
hypotheses.trigger_logic_pseudocode: IF (AI Sector Volatility Index > 25) AND (Nasdaq-100 ETF Price Change < -3%) THEN (Market Fear Index > 20) THEN Hypothesis Triggered
hypotheses.why_this_should_work: AI stocks are a major driver of Nasdaq-100 performance. High volatility in AI stocks may lead to increased uncertainty, prompting investors to sell Nasdaq-100 ETFs and move to safer assets.
hypotheses.when_this_may_fail: If the broader market is in a bull phase or if AI stocks are broadly undervalued, the impact of volatility may be less pronounced.
hypotheses.data_quality_or_leakage_risks: AI sector volatility data may be noisy or subject to short-term spikes. ETF price change data may be delayed or incomplete.
hypotheses.minimum_data_coverage_requirement: At least 80% coverage of AI sector volatility and Nasdaq-100 ETF price changes for the past 60 days.
validation_plan: Analyze AI sector volatility before and after major news events
Compare Nasdaq-100 ETF price changes with AI sector volatility
Monitor VIX and other fear indices for signs of increased market stress
hypotheses.dashboard_implication: Monitor AI sector volatility and Nasdaq-100 ETF performance for signs of cross-asset stress.

hypotheses.title: Nasdaq-100 ETF Inflows and AI Stock Performance as Leading Indicators
hypotheses.plain_english_thesis: Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows and AI stock performance may serve as leading indicators of broader market sentiment and risk appetite, particularly in the tech sector.
hypotheses.economic_market_mechanism: Nasdaq-100 ETFs are heavily weighted toward tech stocks, including AI-driven companies. Inflows into these ETFs may indicate increased investor confidence in the tech sector, while declines may signal risk aversion.
hypotheses.target_definition: The potential for Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows and AI stock performance to signal long-term market trends and risk appetite, influencing broader portfolio allocations.
hypotheses.trigger_logic_pseudocode: IF (Nasdaq-100 ETF Inflows > 50B) AND (AI Sector Return > 10%) THEN (Risk Appetite Index > 50) THEN Hypothesis Triggered
hypotheses.why_this_should_work: Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows and AI stock performance are closely tied to investor sentiment and risk appetite. Strong inflows and positive returns may indicate a bullish trend in the tech sector.
hypotheses.when_this_may_fail: If the broader market is in a bear phase or if AI stocks are overvalued, the positive signals from ETF inflows and AI stock performance may be misleading.
hypotheses.data_quality_or_leakage_risks: ETF inflow data may be delayed or subject to reporting errors. AI sector return data may be influenced by short-term events unrelated to long-term trends.
hypotheses.minimum_data_coverage_requirement: At least 90% coverage of Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows and AI sector returns for the past 126 days.
validation_plan: Compare Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows with AI sector returns over time
Analyze Risk Appetite Index in relation to ETF inflows and AI stock performance
Monitor for consistency in signals over multiple market cycles
hypotheses.dashboard_implication: Track Nasdaq-100 ETF inflows and AI sector returns to gauge long-term market sentiment and risk appetite.
